sections.heading: Questions, answered before you reach out.

items.q: What happens after I submit the form?
items.a: Within 2 business days you'll get a written 20-point local audit of your business — your Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, site speed, and how you stack up against your top 5 local competitors. If it looks like a fit, we'll invite you to a 45-minute strategy call. There's no pitch attached to the audit itself.

items.q: How fast will someone get back to me?
items.a: Call during business hours (Mon–Fri, 9a–6p ET) and a real person answers — we aim to pick up or return your call within 4 business hours. Email replies typically go out within 1 business day. The written audit lands within 2 business days.

Yes. No credit card, no strings, no obligation to hire us. We run 3–5 free audits a month as part of how we find good-fit clients, so if we're booked up when you reach out, we'll tell you within a day.

items.q: Do you only work with Massachusetts businesses?
items.a: We focus on Woburn, Boston, and Greater Boston because we know the market and can meet you in person. We take on Massachusetts-adjacent clients case by case. If you're outside the Northeast, we'll be straight with you and likely refer you to someone better placed to help.

We're at 400 Tradecenter Dr, Suite 5900, Woburn, MA 01801, and we've been here helping Massachusetts small businesses win local search since 2003. The office is by appointment only — call ahead at (781) 730-6971 and we'll set a time.

items.q: What does it cost to work with you?
items.a: Most clients start with our Smart Website & Marketing Package at $500/month on a 12-month agreement — that covers your website, hosting, on-page SEO, your AI Website Chatbot and AI Voice Receptionist (plus per-minute usage), Google Business Profile, reviews, and social posting. When you want to grow faster, you can add accelerators: SEO content and link building at $1,299/month, Google Ads management at $1,299/month, or Meta Ads management at $999/month (ad spend not included). We'll recommend the right mix after your free audit.

items.q: What if I'm not sure what I need yet?
items.a: That's fine — most owners aren't. Pick "Not sure — I need guidance" on the form, or just call. The free audit shows you where your business is leaking leads first, so you can decide what's worth fixing before you spend a dollar. To see the full menu first, browse what we do.

sections.headline: Rather just pick up the phone?
sections.body: No forms, no waiting. Call and you'll talk to the same team that's been helping Massachusetts small businesses win the map pack since 2003 — straight answers about your map-pack rankings, your website, and what an AI front desk could do for your after-hours calls.
